channel.title: azurewebapps on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in azurewebapps on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Let's Encrypt and Azure Websites
item.description: This is awesome. Would still like this to see this made much easier (as the author says towards the end of the article), but anyway this makes using Let’s Encrypt with Azure websites possible and relatively easy; https://www.troyhunt.com/everything-you-need-to-know-about-loading-a-free-lets-encrypt-certificate-into-an-azure-website/
